text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: One day, I'm walking to the train station, when...

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Well, if it isn't Suzuka! That outfit... By the looks
of it, I'm guessing you're training?

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
That's right. I know it's a day off, but I didn't have
any plans, so I thought I may as well run.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: I'd love to join you!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
...Ah, but unfortunately, I already made some
plans and I can't change them now!

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
Hehe, I'll let you know the next time I plan a run.
Well, then. I'll be off.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Yep! Have a good day! Let's definitely run
together next time!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I board the train, where I'm swayed gently to and
fro for about an hour...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Later, just as I'm finishing up my errand, I glimpse
none other than Special Week.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Phew! I'm stuffed! It's a good thing I entered that
all-you-can-eat sushi draw!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It seems that by some coincidence, Special Week
ended up in the same part of town. Little did I
know, the coincidences would only continue to
stack up.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Huff... Huff... Phew.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Oh! It's Suzuka! ♪Wow, who knew I'd see her
twice in one day?

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: H-hold on! Suzuka?!

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Oh, Spe. What's the matter?

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
What are you doing here? Did you run all this
way?!

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: ...Huh? How did I come this far?

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: ...Phew.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Whooooa. 'Course I'm surprised that we ran into
each other twice today, but I'm even more
surprised you ran all the way here!

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: I do this sometimes.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
I just get so focused on running and the
ever-changing scenery.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
I keep wondering what new views await me if I just
keep going.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
And then, next thing I know, I find that I've run
quite a distance...

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Well, I think that's what makes you, you.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
After all, it's your dream to see as many different
views as possible, isn't it?

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Hehe... That's right.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
I'll keep running for as long as it takes to achieve
my dream.
